description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier - discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Reusable ingestion, provenance, and aesthetic-propagation organ that turns scattered chats, notes, screenshots, bookmarks, docs, and repo material into classified artifacts, deployment manifests, provenance records, and taste-aware creative briefs.
ranked.first_task: Add a contract-checked `alchemia discover --source-dir ... --dry-run` command that produces one reviewable report for inventory, duplicates, classification confidence, pending review, deployment planning, provenance preview, and aesthetic prompt packs without touching remote repos.
